records.m_Talk_ENG: Mommy...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mommy...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mommy...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way! Quickly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way! Quickly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way! Quickly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's this hallucination again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's this hallucination again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's this hallucination again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The one where the girl in the hospital gown is getting further away from me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The one where the girl in the hospital gown is getting further away from me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The one where the girl in the hospital gown is getting further away from me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how fast I run and reach out my hand, she only gets further away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how fast I run and reach out my hand, she only gets further away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how fast I run and reach out my hand, she only gets further away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That it's too late for me to...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That it's too late for me to...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That it's too late for me to...

records.m_Talk_ENG: try and hold her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: try and hold her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: try and hold her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but regret it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but regret it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but regret it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a short trip, but it was fun, Mommy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a short trip, but it was fun, Mommy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a short trip, but it was fun, Mommy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do it again the next time we meet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do it again the next time we meet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do it again the next time we meet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this another dream?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this another dream?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this another dream?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: all that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: all that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: all that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all...

records.m_Talk_ENG: just completely gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: just completely gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: just completely gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this another hallucination? Or just a whim of the Counterside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this another hallucination? Or just a whim of the Counterside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this another hallucination? Or just a whim of the Counterside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The massive abyssal fortress that swallowed me is left in ruins in front of my eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The massive abyssal fortress that swallowed me is left in ruins in front of my eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The massive abyssal fortress that swallowed me is left in ruins in front of my eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something felt off that I was lucky enough to survive the blast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something felt off that I was lucky enough to survive the blast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something felt off that I was lucky enough to survive the blast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

records.m_Talk_ENG: those weren't traces of an explosion taking place here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: those weren't traces of an explosion taking place here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: those weren't traces of an explosion taking place here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, on the edges of the surfaces cut clean like the surface of the moon...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, on the edges of the surfaces cut clean like the surface of the moon...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, on the edges of the surfaces cut clean like the surface of the moon...

records.m_Talk_ENG: there were lush trees stretching out their branches, as if they were trying to send me a message.
records.m_Talk_DEU: there were lush trees stretching out their branches, as if they were trying to send me a message.
records.m_Talk_FRA: there were lush trees stretching out their branches, as if they were trying to send me a message.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't a dream or a hallucination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't a dream or a hallucination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't a dream or a hallucination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wherever you are, I'll find you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wherever you are, I'll find you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wherever you are, I'll find you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... come get you, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... come get you, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... come get you, no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the place, right? Where the Qlipha or whatever it's called energy was detected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the place, right? Where the Qlipha or whatever it's called energy was detected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the place, right? Where the Qlipha or whatever it's called energy was detected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's nothing here! I stayed up all night for four days just to find the coordinates to get here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there's nothing here! I stayed up all night for four days just to find the coordinates to get here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's nothing here! I stayed up all night for four days just to find the coordinates to get here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's uncommon for trees to grow in the Counterside. Which means this place is no ordinary place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's uncommon for trees to grow in the Counterside. Which means this place is no ordinary place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's uncommon for trees to grow in the Counterside. Which means this place is no ordinary place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't see the Artifact that the <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> was talking about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't see the Artifact that the <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> was talking about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't see the Artifact that the <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> was talking about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Analyzing the residuals of the Corruption ray, it looks like traces of a dimensional rift...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Analyzing the residuals of the Corruption ray, it looks like traces of a dimensional rift...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Analyzing the residuals of the Corruption ray, it looks like traces of a dimensional rift...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I track this one too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I track this one too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I track this one too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chasing after a rift that's been mixed with Corruption rays will lead you to a Corruption pit or even the imaginary space. It's the perfect plan for a suicide.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chasing after a rift that's been mixed with Corruption rays will lead you to a Corruption pit or even the imaginary space. It's the perfect plan for a suicide.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chasing after a rift that's been mixed with Corruption rays will lead you to a Corruption pit or even the imaginary space. It's the perfect plan for a suicide.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I love it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I love it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I love it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, I know, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, I know, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, I know, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm done collecting the waveforms. Let's go back and analyze them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm done collecting the waveforms. Let's go back and analyze them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm done collecting the waveforms. Let's go back and analyze them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we're sitting down, shall we start analyzing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we're sitting down, shall we start analyzing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we're sitting down, shall we start analyzing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before that, let's circle around the coordinates just in case that pesky Administration catches wind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before that, let's circle around the coordinates just in case that pesky Administration catches wind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before that, let's circle around the coordinates just in case that pesky Administration catches wind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. You're awfully thorough for someone who's that bulky...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. You're awfully thorough for someone who's that bulky...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. You're awfully thorough for someone who's that bulky...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you do also smell something funny?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you do also smell something funny?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you do also smell something funny?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't remember boarding a girl on our ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't remember boarding a girl on our ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't remember boarding a girl on our ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't move! So much as twitch and your friend's brain's gonna be splattered on the wall!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't move! So much as twitch and your friend's brain's gonna be splattered on the wall!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't move! So much as twitch and your friend's brain's gonna be splattered on the wall!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Is that so, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Is that so, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Is that so, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I said, don't move!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I said, don't move!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I said, don't move!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Tin can! She said, don't move! You wanna see my head get blown off?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Tin can! She said, don't move! You wanna see my head get blown off?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Tin can! She said, don't move! You wanna see my head get blown off?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ... I mean, I'd be kinda curious too, but.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ... I mean, I'd be kinda curious too, but.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ... I mean, I'd be kinda curious too, but.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway! She'll kill me! Dammit! Just do as she says!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway! She'll kill me! Dammit! Just do as she says!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway! She'll kill me! Dammit! Just do as she says!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did you get on our ship?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did you get on our ship?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did you get on our ship?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Just before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Just before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Just before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what's your purpose?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what's your purpose?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what's your purpose?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's some place I need to go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's some place I need to go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's some place I need to go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you take me to my destination, your friend won't get hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you take me to my destination, your friend won't get hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you take me to my destination, your friend won't get hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh yeah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh yeah?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh yeah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't think you can make it to your destination with your current state of mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't think you can make it to your destination with your current state of mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't think you can make it to your destination with your current state of mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...* Stop talking...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...* Stop talking...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...* Stop talking...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, you're right! Corruption ray exposure? Or is it withdrawal? From the looks of it, it's in its late stages.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, you're right! Corruption ray exposure? Or is it withdrawal? From the looks of it, it's in its late stages.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, you're right! Corruption ray exposure? Or is it withdrawal? From the looks of it, it's in its late stages.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Want me to help? I got tons of drugs. I'll even mix and match them to your needs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Want me to help? I got tons of drugs. I'll even mix and match them to your needs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Want me to help? I got tons of drugs. I'll even mix and match them to your needs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop annoying me and... start the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop annoying me and... start the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop annoying me and... start the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like your guts, but I'll have to refuse on that offer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like your guts, but I'll have to refuse on that offer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like your guts, but I'll have to refuse on that offer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That guy you're holding hostage isn't important enough for us to use our fuel on him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That guy you're holding hostage isn't important enough for us to use our fuel on him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That guy you're holding hostage isn't important enough for us to use our fuel on him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh come on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh come on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh come on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once he's dead, you're next.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once he's dead, you're next.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once he's dead, you're next.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't think that huge hammer is going to be faster than me pulling a trigger, do you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't think that huge hammer is going to be faster than me pulling a trigger, do you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't think that huge hammer is going to be faster than me pulling a trigger, do you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, we can certainly find out if you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, we can certainly find out if you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, we can certainly find out if you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Khhk...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Khhk...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Khhk...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now. We're all busy people, so let's stop the fighting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now. We're all busy people, so let's stop the fighting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now. We're all busy people, so let's stop the fighting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know what they say, haste makes waste. How about we talk it out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know what they say, haste makes waste. How about we talk it out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know what they say, haste makes waste. How about we talk it out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the occasion? You haven't done anything but read your book.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's the occasion? You haven't done anything but read your book.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the occasion? You haven't done anything but read your book.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Rookie</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Rookie</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Rookie</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm not usually the type to get involved in other people's business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm not usually the type to get involved in other people's business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm not usually the type to get involved in other people's business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I have personal business with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I have personal business with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I have personal business with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Joo Shiyoon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Joo Shiyoon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Joo Shiyoon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To briefly introduce myself, let's just say that I'm a swordsman and negotiator wandering all dimensions in search of treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To briefly introduce myself, let's just say that I'm a swordsman and negotiator wandering all dimensions in search of treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To briefly introduce myself, let's just say that I'm a swordsman and negotiator wandering all dimensions in search of treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. To me you're just another pirate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. To me you're just another pirate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. To me you're just another pirate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I don't trust what pirates say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I don't trust what pirates say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I don't trust what pirates say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Since I am the rookie crew mate, I can't say that I'm not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Since I am the rookie crew mate, I can't say that I'm not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Since I am the rookie crew mate, I can't say that I'm not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I also have no intention of harming you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I also have no intention of harming you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I also have no intention of harming you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, if we're headed toward the same place, then I don't see why we have to fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, if we're headed toward the same place, then I don't see why we have to fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, if we're headed toward the same place, then I don't see why we have to fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... and I are headed toward the same place...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... and I are headed toward the same place...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... and I are headed toward the same place...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, how about you calm down so we can talk, Ms. Freeheart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, how about you calm down so we can talk, Ms. Freeheart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, how about you calm down so we can talk, Ms. Freeheart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How... do you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How... do you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How... do you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, that was a close one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, that was a close one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, that was a close one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for buying us time, rookie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for buying us time, rookie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for buying us time, rookie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, don't mention it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, don't mention it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, don't mention it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for just buying time, her reaction tells me that you got her name right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for just buying time, her reaction tells me that you got her name right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for just buying time, her reaction tells me that you got her name right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our first encounter was a little unpleasant, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our first encounter was a little unpleasant, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our first encounter was a little unpleasant, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: she'll be our guide who'll help us on this journey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: she'll be our guide who'll help us on this journey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: she'll be our guide who'll help us on this journey.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Her mag was empty. So she tried to hijack our ship without any bullets?

root.m_Talk_ENG: all that?

root.m_Talk_FRA: all that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all...

root.m_Talk_ENG: just completely gone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: just completely gone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: just completely gone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this another hallucination? Or just a whim of the Counterside?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this another hallucination? Or just a whim of the Counterside?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this another hallucination? Or just a whim of the Counterside?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The massive abyssal fortress that swallowed me is left in ruins in front of my eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The massive abyssal fortress that swallowed me is left in ruins in front of my eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The massive abyssal fortress that swallowed me is left in ruins in front of my eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something felt off that I was lucky enough to survive the blast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something felt off that I was lucky enough to survive the blast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something felt off that I was lucky enough to survive the blast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

root.m_Talk_ENG: those weren't traces of an explosion taking place here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: those weren't traces of an explosion taking place here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: those weren't traces of an explosion taking place here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, on the edges of the surfaces cut clean like the surface of the moon...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, on the edges of the surfaces cut clean like the surface of the moon...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, on the edges of the surfaces cut clean like the surface of the moon...

root.m_Talk_ENG: there were lush trees stretching out their branches, as if they were trying to send me a message.
root.m_Talk_DEU: there were lush trees stretching out their branches, as if they were trying to send me a message.
root.m_Talk_FRA: there were lush trees stretching out their branches, as if they were trying to send me a message.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't a dream or a hallucination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't a dream or a hallucination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't a dream or a hallucination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wherever you are, I'll find you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wherever you are, I'll find you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wherever you are, I'll find you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... come get you, no matter what.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... come get you, no matter what.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... come get you, no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the place, right? Where the Qlipha or whatever it's called energy was detected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the place, right? Where the Qlipha or whatever it's called energy was detected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the place, right? Where the Qlipha or whatever it's called energy was detected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there's nothing here! I stayed up all night for four days just to find the coordinates to get here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there's nothing here! I stayed up all night for four days just to find the coordinates to get here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there's nothing here! I stayed up all night for four days just to find the coordinates to get here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's uncommon for trees to grow in the Counterside. Which means this place is no ordinary place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's uncommon for trees to grow in the Counterside. Which means this place is no ordinary place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's uncommon for trees to grow in the Counterside. Which means this place is no ordinary place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't see the Artifact that the <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> was talking about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't see the Artifact that the <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> was talking about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't see the Artifact that the <color=#ffd34c>rookie</color> was talking about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Analyzing the residuals of the Corruption ray, it looks like traces of a dimensional rift...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Analyzing the residuals of the Corruption ray, it looks like traces of a dimensional rift...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Analyzing the residuals of the Corruption ray, it looks like traces of a dimensional rift...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should I track this one too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should I track this one too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should I track this one too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chasing after a rift that's been mixed with Corruption rays will lead you to a Corruption pit or even the imaginary space. It's the perfect plan for a suicide.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chasing after a rift that's been mixed with Corruption rays will lead you to a Corruption pit or even the imaginary space. It's the perfect plan for a suicide.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chasing after a rift that's been mixed with Corruption rays will lead you to a Corruption pit or even the imaginary space. It's the perfect plan for a suicide.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I love it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I love it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I love it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, I know, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, I know, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, I know, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm done collecting the waveforms. Let's go back and analyze them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm done collecting the waveforms. Let's go back and analyze them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm done collecting the waveforms. Let's go back and analyze them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we're sitting down, shall we start analyzing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we're sitting down, shall we start analyzing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we're sitting down, shall we start analyzing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before that, let's circle around the coordinates just in case that pesky Administration catches wind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before that, let's circle around the coordinates just in case that pesky Administration catches wind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before that, let's circle around the coordinates just in case that pesky Administration catches wind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. You're awfully thorough for someone who's that bulky...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. You're awfully thorough for someone who's that bulky...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. You're awfully thorough for someone who's that bulky...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you do also smell something funny?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you do also smell something funny?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you do also smell something funny?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't remember boarding a girl on our ship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't remember boarding a girl on our ship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't remember boarding a girl on our ship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't move! So much as twitch and your friend's brain's gonna be splattered on the wall!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't move! So much as twitch and your friend's brain's gonna be splattered on the wall!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't move! So much as twitch and your friend's brain's gonna be splattered on the wall!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Is that so, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Is that so, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Is that so, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I said, don't move!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I said, don't move!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I said, don't move!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Tin can! She said, don't move! You wanna see my head get blown off?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Tin can! She said, don't move! You wanna see my head get blown off?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Tin can! She said, don't move! You wanna see my head get blown off?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ... I mean, I'd be kinda curious too, but.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ... I mean, I'd be kinda curious too, but.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ... I mean, I'd be kinda curious too, but.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway! She'll kill me! Dammit! Just do as she says!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway! She'll kill me! Dammit! Just do as she says!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway! She'll kill me! Dammit! Just do as she says!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When did you get on our ship?
root.m_Talk_DEU: When did you get on our ship?
root.m_Talk_FRA: When did you get on our ship?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Just before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Just before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Just before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what's your purpose?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what's your purpose?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what's your purpose?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's some place I need to go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's some place I need to go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's some place I need to go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you take me to my destination, your friend won't get hurt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you take me to my destination, your friend won't get hurt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you take me to my destination, your friend won't get hurt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh yeah?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh yeah?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh yeah?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't think you can make it to your destination with your current state of mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't think you can make it to your destination with your current state of mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't think you can make it to your destination with your current state of mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...* Stop talking...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...* Stop talking...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...* Stop talking...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, you're right! Corruption ray exposure? Or is it withdrawal? From the looks of it, it's in its late stages.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, you're right! Corruption ray exposure? Or is it withdrawal? From the looks of it, it's in its late stages.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, you're right! Corruption ray exposure? Or is it withdrawal? From the looks of it, it's in its late stages.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Want me to help? I got tons of drugs. I'll even mix and match them to your needs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Want me to help? I got tons of drugs. I'll even mix and match them to your needs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Want me to help? I got tons of drugs. I'll even mix and match them to your needs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop annoying me and... start the ship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop annoying me and... start the ship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop annoying me and... start the ship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like your guts, but I'll have to refuse on that offer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like your guts, but I'll have to refuse on that offer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like your guts, but I'll have to refuse on that offer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That guy you're holding hostage isn't important enough for us to use our fuel on him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That guy you're holding hostage isn't important enough for us to use our fuel on him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That guy you're holding hostage isn't important enough for us to use our fuel on him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh come on!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh come on!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh come on!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once he's dead, you're next.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once he's dead, you're next.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once he's dead, you're next.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't think that huge hammer is going to be faster than me pulling a trigger, do you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't think that huge hammer is going to be faster than me pulling a trigger, do you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't think that huge hammer is going to be faster than me pulling a trigger, do you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, we can certainly find out if you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, we can certainly find out if you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, we can certainly find out if you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Khhk...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Khhk...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Khhk...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now. We're all busy people, so let's stop the fighting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now. We're all busy people, so let's stop the fighting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now. We're all busy people, so let's stop the fighting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know what they say, haste makes waste. How about we talk it out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know what they say, haste makes waste. How about we talk it out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know what they say, haste makes waste. How about we talk it out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's the occasion? You haven't done anything but read your book.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's the occasion? You haven't done anything but read your book.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's the occasion? You haven't done anything but read your book.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Rookie</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Rookie</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Rookie</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm not usually the type to get involved in other people's business.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm not usually the type to get involved in other people's business.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm not usually the type to get involved in other people's business.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I have personal business with her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I have personal business with her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I have personal business with her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Joo Shiyoon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Joo Shiyoon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Joo Shiyoon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To briefly introduce myself, let's just say that I'm a swordsman and negotiator wandering all dimensions in search of treasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To briefly introduce myself, let's just say that I'm a swordsman and negotiator wandering all dimensions in search of treasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To briefly introduce myself, let's just say that I'm a swordsman and negotiator wandering all dimensions in search of treasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. To me you're just another pirate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. To me you're just another pirate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. To me you're just another pirate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I don't trust what pirates say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I don't trust what pirates say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I don't trust what pirates say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Since I am the rookie crew mate, I can't say that I'm not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Since I am the rookie crew mate, I can't say that I'm not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Since I am the rookie crew mate, I can't say that I'm not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I also have no intention of harming you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I also have no intention of harming you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I also have no intention of harming you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You see, if we're headed toward the same place, then I don't see why we have to fight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You see, if we're headed toward the same place, then I don't see why we have to fight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You see, if we're headed toward the same place, then I don't see why we have to fight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... and I are headed toward the same place...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... and I are headed toward the same place...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... and I are headed toward the same place...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, how about you calm down so we can talk, Ms. Freeheart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, how about you calm down so we can talk, Ms. Freeheart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, how about you calm down so we can talk, Ms. Freeheart?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How... do you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How... do you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How... do you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, that was a close one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, that was a close one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, that was a close one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for buying us time, rookie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for buying us time, rookie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for buying us time, rookie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, don't mention it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, don't mention it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, don't mention it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for just buying time, her reaction tells me that you got her name right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for just buying time, her reaction tells me that you got her name right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for just buying time, her reaction tells me that you got her name right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our first encounter was a little unpleasant, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our first encounter was a little unpleasant, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our first encounter was a little unpleasant, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: she'll be our guide who'll help us on this journey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: she'll be our guide who'll help us on this journey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: she'll be our guide who'll help us on this journey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Her mag was empty. So she tried to hijack our ship without any bullets?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Her mag was empty. So she tried to hijack our ship without any bullets?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Her mag was empty. So she tried to hijack our ship without any bullets?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's got guts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's got guts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's got guts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone knew from just hearing the gun that it was a bluff except you, Ra9586l.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone knew from just hearing the gun that it was a bluff except you, Ra9586l.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone knew from just hearing the gun that it was a bluff except you, Ra9586l.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Guess I gotta upgrade my hearing aids then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Guess I gotta upgrade my hearing aids then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Guess I gotta upgrade my hearing aids then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look over there. There's a huge tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look over there. There's a huge tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look over there. There's a huge tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd also sees a house. Looks like people live over there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd also sees a house. Looks like people live over there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd also sees a house. Looks like people live over there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd will go over there and find a smart adult who'll fix you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd will go over there and find a smart adult who'll fix you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd will go over there and find a smart adult who'll fix you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So wait here for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So wait here for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So wait here for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lurcher.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher.
